# openai_project_user_role (Resource)

Manage a project-level role assignment for a user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_project_user_role" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
  user_id    = "user_123"
  role_id    = "role_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id
- `role_id` (String) role id
- `user_id` (String) user id

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) description
- `name` (String) name
- `permissions` (List of String) permissions
- `predefined_role` (Boolean) predefined role
- `resource_type` (String) resource type

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = openai_project_user_role.example
  id = "proj_123/user_123/role_123"
}
```
